explanations: Finalists were recalculated through the complete build calculator.
Set bonus active: Chaos Harbinger at 2 pieces (6/6 equipped).
Set bonus active: Chaos Harbinger at 4 pieces (6/6 equipped).
Set bonus active: Chaos Harbinger at 6 pieces (6/6 equipped).

Heroic Calanthia's Touch: Effect 1: Evasion +220 — feeds #1 PvP Evasion; alternatives: Perception +11, Fortitude +11, Endurance +220. Effect 2: Hit Chance +220 — feeds #5 PvP Melee Hit Chance; alternatives: Perception +11, Fortitude +11, Evasion +220. Effect 3: Melee Hit Chance +220 — feeds #5 PvP Melee Hit Chance; alternatives: Perception +11, Fortitude +11, Evasion +220.

Heroic Choking Conviction: Effect 1: Evasion +220 — feeds #1 PvP Evasion; alternatives: Dexterity +11, Wisdom +11, Perception +11. Effect 2: Dexterity +11 — improves no ranked goal; kept as a deterministic tie-breaker; alternatives: Wisdom +11, Perception +11, Fortitude +11. Effect 3: Hit Chance +220 — feeds #5 PvP Melee Hit Chance; alternatives: Dexterity +11, Wisdom +11, Perception +11.
Head: Attack Defense Assist supplies +2 Strength toward attribute milestones.
Chest: Attack Defense Assist supplies +2 Dexterity toward attribute milestones.
Necklace: Attack Assist Defense supplies +3 Wisdom toward attribute milestones.
Ring 1: Attack Assist Defense supplies +3 Perception toward attribute milestones.
Ring 2: Attack Assist Defense supplies +3 Perception toward attribute milestones.
PvP Evasion: 25200 at priority 1; normalized contribution +0.345; components PvP Melee Evasion 2,520, PvP Ranged Evasion 2,530, PvP Magic Evasion 2,694.
PvP Melee Critical Hit Chance: 30690 at priority 2; normalized contribution +0.123.
Critical Damage: 4680 at priority 3; normalized contribution +0.035.
PvP Damage: 110 at priority 4; normalized contribution +0.002.
PvP Melee Hit Chance: 35284 at priority 5; normalized contribution +0.069; minimum 30000 met.
Max Health: 43494.54 at priority 6; normalized contribution +0.002; minimum 35000 met.
No selected goal finished below the fixed objective baseline.
assumptions: Item Potentials are excluded from calculations and recommendations in this release; same-item selections are preserved.
59 available attribute points were redistributed across STR, DEX, INT, PER, and CON.
This is a theoretical catalogue build. Ownership and acquisition cost are not scored.
Eight passive skills were selected at up to level 20.
Dagger mastery uses 220 of 220 available points.
Sword and Shield mastery uses 220 of 220 available points.
Only decoded-proven persistent Skill Cores are optimized; conditional or unsupported cores receive no invented static value.
The game allows repeated Equipment Skills, but exact scoring activates only one copy in the current fixed-level catalogue.
Exactly three normal rune sockets are considered; normal rune rows may repeat.
No more than one Chaos rune is used per item.
warnings: This is a bounded search, so the result is the best loadout found rather than proof of the mathematical global optimum.
